name: Ama Marine Public Company Limited
summary: Ama Marine Public Company Limited engages in marine transportation business in Southeast Asia regions, China, India, and Thailand. It operates through two segments, Marine Transportation and Logistic Services. The company owns and operates a fleet of 10 tankers that has a total capacity of 91,443 DWT to transport palm oil, vegetable oil, and others chemicals. It also transports petrol, bio diesel, and vegetable oil through operating 216 trucks and semi-trailers in Thailand. The company was founded in 1996 and is based in Bangkok, Thailand.
